assessment.note: She says the push succeeded but rejects that pace becoming normal, which signals strain around how the work is being run and a mild drop in willingness to sustain it; also revealed a wellbeing risk worth probing next.

new_queue.label: Normal pace
new_queue.name: What would make that pace start feeling normal from your read?
new_queue.description: Drills into her concern about the push becoming the default and surfaces the pattern or signals she is worried about.

new_queue.label: Opening pace check
new_queue.name: How's the last two weeks actually felt — energy-wise?
new_queue.description: Opener that invites a real answer rather than 'fine'. Reads wellbeing directly.

new_queue.label: Priority clarity
new_queue.name: What are you actually focused on this week, and why those things?
new_queue.description: Surfaces whether priorities are crisp or vague; whether they match what you thought.

new_queue.label: Priority tradeoff
new_queue.name: What are you choosing not to do right now?
new_queue.description: Forces the real tradeoff behind her current focus and whether the load is being consciously managed.

new_queue.label: Next two weeks
new_queue.name: What would make the next two weeks feel steadier for you?
new_queue.description: Closes by turning the discussion into a practical plan for a calmer, clearer stretch ahead.
